# fixture: state-non-phased.txt
# State: Normal (non-phased) package update.
# apt-cache policy output characteristic: no "(phased N%)" tag anywhere.
# DepCache.phasing_applied() returns False.
# DepCache.is_upgradable() returns True.
#
# v3.x behaviour: Correct — package included in upgrade list.
# v4.2 expected: Package INCLUDED. phasing_applied() returns False.
#
# This fixture is the baseline correctness case. A phasing-detection regression
# that accidentally excludes non-phased packages would fail this fixture.
#
# Source: representative output from PBWEBSRV03 for curl (normal update, not phased).
curl:
  Installed: 8.5.0-2ubuntu10.8
  Candidate: 8.5.0-2ubuntu10.9
  Version table:
     8.5.0-2ubuntu10.9 500
        500 http://security.ubuntu.com/ubuntu noble-security/main amd64 Packages
        500 http://ca.archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu noble-updates/main amd64 Packages
 *** 8.5.0-2ubuntu10.8 500
        500 http://ca.archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu noble/main amd64 Packages
        100 /var/lib/dpkg/status
